name: Cloak of Elvenkind
description:
This cloak is deep green with a voluminous hood, embroidered with gold trim and symbols significant in elven culture. The cloak allows you to cast the cantrip as an arcane innate spell.

When you adjust the cloak's clasp (an Interact action), the cloak transforms to match the environment around you and muffles your sounds, granting you a +1 item bonus to Stealth checks.

Activate 2 Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect You draw the hood up and gain the effects of , with the spell's normal duration or until you pull the hood back down, whichever comes first. If you're also wearing you can activate this ability twice per day.
